title: node:test, Fixtures, Compile-Negative Cases, Faults, and Mutation Evidence · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs node:test, fixtures, compile-negative cases, faults, and mutation evidence from revision, authorization, seed, URL, policy, response bytes, parsed identity, record provenance, frontier transition, Promise settlement, browser state, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for risk-layered deterministic crawler test system after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit th…
objectives: Build original accepted, malformed, adversarial, boundary, changed, Unicode, duplicate, inaccessible, and privacy-sensitive fixtures with provenance.
Test URL, robots, sitemap, state, scheduling, extraction, dedup, report, and recovery invariants with deterministic clocks and schedules.
Use expected TypeScript errors to prove invalid state, unsafe narrowing, mutable values, and missing exhaustive cases are rejected.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Mutation Detecti…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 8077 during a hostile redirect, stream, and checkpoint drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove original fixtures, pure models, compile-negative tests, loopback faults, and mutation detection; owner authorization and revocation must remain separate from robots and legal-review claims; then change one test, mutation, package, browser binary, container, capacity, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Seed defects in scope, robots, byte limits, selector cardinality, visited timing, abort, report escaping, and recovery and require tests to fail.

Inspect the Mutation Detection trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
